x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Software Asset Workspace is the primary interface where Now Assist SAM AI insights are presented to analysts. Without it, AI-generated license recommendations and reclamation suggestions are produced but never surfaced where SAM analysts work.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app"); gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_sam_workspace"); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Software Asset Workspace is active", finding: "Software Asset Workspace is active. Now Assist SAM AI insights including license recommendations and reclamation suggestions are surfaced in context for SAM analysts." }; } var gr2 = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins"); gr2.addQuery("id", "sn_sam_ws"); gr2.addQuery("active", true); gr2.setLimit(1); gr2.query(); if (gr2.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Software Asset Workspace is active", finding: "Software Asset Workspace is active. Now Assist SAM AI insights are surfaced in context for SAM analysts." }; } return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "Software Asset Workspace not found or inactive", finding: "Software Asset Workspace is not active. Now Assist SAM AI insights are not accessible in a contextually relevant interface for SAM analysts." }; })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate the Software Asset Workspace via the ServiceNow Store or Plugin Manager. The workspace is required for Now Assist SAM AI insights to surface in context for software asset analysts.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_5bf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ca1
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Software Asset Workspace is the primary interface where Now Assist SAM AI insights are presented to analysts. Without it, AI-generated license recommendations and reclamation suggestions are produced but never surfaced where SAM analysts work.]]></ai_justification><check_name>SAM Workspace Activation</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app"); gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_sam_workspace"); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Software Asset Workspace is active", finding: "Software Asset Workspace is active. Now Assist SAM AI insights including license recommendations and reclamation suggestions are surfaced in context for SAM analysts." }; } var gr2 = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins"); gr2.addQuery("id", "sn_sam_ws"); gr2.addQuery("active", true); gr2.setLimit(1); gr2.query(); if (gr2.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Software Asset Workspace is active", finding: "Software Asset Workspace is active. Now Assist SAM AI insights are surfaced in context for SAM analysts." }; } return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "Software Asset Workspace not found or inactive", finding: "Software Asset Workspace is not active. Now Assist SAM AI insights are not accessible in a contextually relevant interface for SAM analysts." }; })]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>SAM</module><number>CHK0000625</number><order>800</order><remediation_guidance>Activate the Software Asset Workspace via the ServiceNow Store or Plugin Manager. The workspace is required for Now Assist SAM AI insights to surface in context for software asset analysts.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:21</sys_created_on><sys_id>5bf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ca1</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>SAM Workspace Activation</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_5bf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ca1</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
